codeReview.summary: Current HEAD does not contain a dedicated `compatibility-identity-consistency-hardening` feature artifact. The existing review file points at commit `30585bb`, but that commit is no longer present in current history and the feature is not recorded in mission `features.json` or `worker-transcripts.jsonl`. The closest current implementation evidence is `cross-area-integration-validation` in commit `36dec3c`, which adds broad identity-consistency tests, but it does not map cleanly to the requested feature ID.

issues.description: The reviewed feature ID `compatibility-identity-consistency-hardening` is absent from mission `features.json`, so there is no authoritative feature metadata or completed worker session to review as assigned.
The prior report is stale: it references commit `30585bb`, but current `git log` on HEAD no longer contains that commit, so the report is not accurate against current HEAD as requested.
No worker transcript entry exists for `compatibility-identity-consistency-hardening`, preventing transcript-based scrutiny of the specified feature implementation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission state and stored scrutiny artifacts have drifted: a review file exists for a feature ID that is no longer represented in `features.json` or current git history.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `features.json` contains completed compatibility-hardening features `parity-audit-and-invalid-param-coverage`, `parity-target-and-release-gate`, and `cross-area-integration-validation`, but no `compatibility-identity-consistency-hardening`; meanwhile the stale review file referenced vanished commit `30585bb`.

summary: Failed review because the requested feature cannot be matched to current mission metadata, transcript records, or reachable git history. I updated the report to reflect that the previous review was stale and not valid against current HEAD.
